nodes.name: Update Close CRM with Airtable ID

parameters.url: =https://api.mn.co/admin/v1/networks/21685656/plans/{{ (['Gold', 'Platinum'].some(t => ($('Parse & Merge Opportunity Data').item.json._opportunity_data.lead_custom['*Program Tier Purchased (N)'] || '').toLowerCase().startsWith(t.toLowerCase()))) ? '1960485' : '1960487' }}/invites?email={{ encodeURIComponent($('Parse & Merge Opportunity Data').item.json.email) }}

value.MN Invite Granted: ={{ (['Gold', 'Platinum'].some(t => ($('Parse & Merge Opportunity Data').item.json._opportunity_data.lead_custom['*Program Tier Purchased (N)'] || '').toLowerCase().startsWith(t.toLowerCase()))) ? 'OK - Gold & Platinum Plan' : 'OK - Bronze & Silver Plan' }}

value.Error Message: ={{ 'MN Plan Invite Error: ' + ($json.error_message || $json.error?.message || JSON.stringify($json.error) || 'MN plan invite failed') }}

parameters.content:
# 🎓 New Student Onboarding — Close CRM → Airtable + Mighty Networks + Intercom + Slack

**Who it's for:** Education businesses, coaching programs, and online academies automating post-sale onboarding.

**What it does:** When a deal is marked "Closed/Won" in Close CRM, this workflow runs the entire student onboarding pipeline — Airtable records, community invite, support contact, and team notification — automatically, with step-specific error handling.

## How it works
1. Close CRM webhook fires on opportunity status change
2. Filters for "Closed/Won" and validates the student's email
3. Fetches full lead + opportunity details from Close CRM API
4. Routes by program tier via Switch node
5. Creates records in Airtable (Student Onboarding + Clients)
6. Invites student to Mighty Networks community
7. Creates Intercom support contact
8. Sends Slack success notification (or step-specific error alerts)

## Setup
1. Configure Close CRM webhook → point to the n8n webhook URL
2. Connect credentials: Airtable, Mighty Networks, Intercom, Slack, Kit
3. Update Airtable base/table IDs, Slack channel ID, and community IDs
4. Test with a test opportunity set to "Closed/Won"

---
**Created by [Ahmad Bukhari](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bukhariahmad)** | [ahmadbukhari.com](https://ahmadbukhari.com)

## ⚡ CRM Trigger & Validation
Receives the Close CRM webhook, filters for "Closed/Won" opportunities, parses lead data with custom field mapping, fetches full opportunity details via API, and validates email before proceeding.

## 📊 Airtable Records
Creates entries in both the Student Onboarding table and Clients table with full student details. If either record creation fails, a Slack alert is sent with error details for manual follow-up.

## 👥 Community & Support
Invites the new student to your Mighty Networks community and creates an Intercom contact. Each integration has independent error handling — one failure won't block others.

## 🔔 Notifications & Email Drip
Sends a Slack success message when onboarding completes. Also triggers a Kit email drip sequence for the welcome series. Step-specific error alerts ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

main.node: Update Close CRM with Airtable ID
